4446.headline: Elport the Gale Keeper was named among the gods.
4446.description: Elport the Gale Keeper is a mysterious creator of storms and change for Rain Oath of Elhelm. The god controls creation, prophecy, destiny, miracles, is marked by a thunder mark, and demands that followers break corrupt oaths openly. Its creation claim says it drove the first people to Marara through warning winds and hard renewal; its religious mandate says religion must cleanse broken orders and break corrupt oaths openly. Prophecies come through thunder breaks, wind warnings, and a thunder mark appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny moves through hidden patterns and repeated signs, miracles lean toward storm, and commandments lean toward law.

4447.headline: Harton the Thunder Lord was named among the gods.
4447.description: Harton the Thunder Lord is a capricious trickster of storms and change for Rain Oath of Elhelm. The god controls destiny, miracles, commandments, is marked by a broken cloud, and demands that followers break corrupt oaths openly. Its creation claim says it drove the first people to Marara through warning winds and hard renewal; its religious mandate says religion must cleanse broken orders and break corrupt oaths openly. Prophecies come through thunder breaks, wind warnings, and a broken cloud appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny bends through reversals, bargains, and misread signs, miracles lean toward storm, and commandments lean toward sacrifice.

4448.headline: Quaovar the Rain Mother was named among the gods.
4448.description: Quaovar the Rain Mother is a stern destroyer of storms and change for Rain Oath of Elhelm. The god controls prophecy, destiny, is marked by a rain drum, and demands that followers break corrupt oaths openly. Its creation claim says it drove the first people to Marara through warning winds and hard renewal; its religious mandate says religion must cleanse broken orders and break corrupt oaths openly. Prophecies come through thunder breaks, wind warnings, and a rain drum appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny is enforced through tests, public duties, and costly proof, miracles lean toward curse, and commandments lean toward war.

4449.headline: Marreach the Lightning Child was named among the gods.
4449.description: Marreach the Lightning Child is a mysterious messenger of storms and change for Rain Oath of Elhelm. The god controls miracles, destiny, commandments, religion, is marked by a forked line, and demands that followers renew law after disaster. Its creation claim says it drove the first people to Marara through warning winds and hard renewal; its religious mandate says religion must cleanse broken orders and renew law after disaster. Prophecies come through thunder breaks, wind warnings, and a forked line appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny arrives through omens carried between places, miracles lean toward storm, and commandments lean toward craft.

4450.headline: Veiled Sign of Keleria, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm entered sacred memory.
4450.description: Veiled Sign of Keleria, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm is a omen myth of storms and change first told in Marara around Aldo Torfell under Elport the Gale Keeper. The creation claim says Elport the Gale Keeper drove the first people to Marara through warning winds and hard renewal. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Elreach Highstone.

4451.headline: Ashen Year of Harora, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm entered sacred memory.
4451.description: Ashen Year of Harora, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm is a cataclysm myth of storms and change first told in Marara around Gorm Wendhold under Harton the Thunder Lord. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Elreach Highstone.

4452.headline: Bound Oath of Galreach, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm entered sacred memory.
4452.description: Bound Oath of Galreach, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm is a covenant myth of storms and change first told in Marara around Fiora Mareria under Quaovar the Rain Mother. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Elreach Highstone.

4453.headline: Speaker of Omens Aldo Torfell was recognized.
4453.description: Aldo Torfell became oracle for Rain Oath of Elhelm in Marara, interpreting Veiled Sign of Keleria, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm of Elport the Gale Keeper with signs read from Belora Spire and Elreach Highstone.

4454.headline: Aldo Torfell formed respect toward Rain Oath of Elhelm.
4454.description: Aldo Torfell formed respect toward Rain Oath of Elhelm after remembering "Speaker of Omens Aldo Torfell was recognized". Intensity 0.66; valence 0.66.

4455.headline: Warder Nash Kelton was recognized.
